arts.ttl: Wednesday's Transfer Talk Update: Kylian Mbappe, Ousmane Dembele, Amad Diallo
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: I spotted Marcus Rashford revive something vs Barnsley that speaks volumes about Man United star
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news as Marcus Rashford found himself on the scoresheet again during Erik ten Hag's side's defeat of Barnsley in the Carabao Cup

arts.ttl: I saw Ruud van Nistelrooy reaction to Marcus Rashford in Manchester United win - it spoke volumes
arts.sum: Man Utd produced a slick attacking display as they dismantled Barnsley 7-0 in the Carabao Cup third round at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd target ‘upset’ star in ominous deal for Casemiro
arts.sum: According to a report, Man Utd are eager to sign Bayern Munich midfielder Leon Goretzka, who is known to be “upset” at the Allianz Arena. Goretzka has an Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) of €20.7 million, and given United have already managed to sign both Noussair Mazraoui and Matthijs de Ligt from Bayern for fees less than the ETVs of both players, the Red Devils should be optimistic of paying less than this figure should they make a move.

arts.ttl: Bizarre Luke Shaw claim highlights one decision Manchester United definitely got right
arts.sum: Man United have restructured their football department this calendar year, making key appointments that were long overdue.

arts.ttl: 'Unreal' Man Utd Star Will Start v Palace Says Goldbridge
arts.sum: Mark Goldbridge has urged Erik ten Hag to start Manchester United midfielder Manuel Ugarte this weekend.

arts.ttl: Forgotten Manuel Ugarte moment showed why Manchester United waited all summer for £42m signing
arts.sum: Manuel Ugarte made his first start for Man Utd since his £42m arrival from Paris Saint-Germain and although he was overshadowed by a glut of goals, he made his presence felt.

arts.ttl: Manchester United take unwanted Premier League record after controversial Old Trafford price rise
arts.sum: A number of Premier League clubs charge disabled fans for parking but Man Utd's parking is the most expensive.

arts.ttl: Why Manchester United allowed Antony to take their penalty vs Barnsley
arts.sum: Antony scored his first goal of the season from the penalty spot in Man United's 7-0 thrashing of Barnsley in the League Cup.

arts.ttl: Man United FFP prediction made as Erik ten Hag warning sent amid transfer 'net spend' reality
arts.sum: The Red Devils saw a huge number of outgoings at Old Trafford this summer
